objective: Fix and close opencodex issues #78 (opencode-go DeepSeek 400: likely reasoning_content replay / tool_choice / schema dialect in openai-chat adapter) and #82 (hy3-preview offered in catalog but upstream model_not_supported). Root-cause with file:line evidence, implement fixes + regression tests, bun test + tsc pass, post closing comments, close both issues via gh.

workPhases.title: Issue #78: root-cause opencode-go DeepSeek 400, fix in adapter or prove upstream-only, comment + close

tasks.title: Trace openai-chat adapter request build for DeepSeek (reasoning replay, tool_choice, schema)
Implement fix + regression test OR document upstream-only proof
bun test + tsc pass on final tree
Post closing comment on #78 and close via gh

workPhases.title: Issue #82: hy3-preview catalog mismatch — fix catalog (respect user's dirty changes), comment + close

tasks.title: Locate hy3-preview in catalog; inspect user's uncommitted catalog.ts/test changes
Fix catalog so unsupported model is not offered (or verify user's change fixes it) + test
Post closing comment on #82 and close via gh

criteria.scenario: Issue #78 root cause identified with file:line evidence; fix implemented with regression test OR upstream-only verdict proven
criteria.expectedEvidence: Explorer/code-trace report with file:line refs; failing-then-passing test or reproduction proof
criteria.capturedEvidence: Root cause: opencode-go registry omitted deepseek-v4-* from preserveReasoningContentModels (src/providers/registry.ts:375); adapter gates replay at openai-chat.ts:57; DeepSeek V4 thinking contract requires replay (api-docs.deepseek.com/guides/thinking_mode). Fix commit 8942c7c3 + tests/opencode-go-deepseek.test.ts (replay, effort map xhigh->max, no-regression). Corroborated: OpenCode 923af96, LiteLLM 7813947, Roo 970deea.

criteria.scenario: Issue #78 has a substantive closing comment and state CLOSED
criteria.expectedEvidence: gh issue view 78 --json state => CLOSED; comment URL
criteria.capturedEvidence: gh issue view 78 => CLOSED COMPLETED. Comment: https://github.com/lidge-jun/opencodex/issues/78#issuecomment-4932494922

criteria.scenario: hy3-preview no longer offered as selectable opencode-go model (or gated correctly), with test coverage
criteria.capturedEvidence: hy3-preview removed from bundle on HEAD (8d69372d); negative assertion added in tests/codex-catalog.test.ts (issue #82 comment block); bun test codex-catalog: 51 pass 0 fail.

criteria.expectedEvidence: gh issue view 82 --json state => CLOSED; comment URL
